entry.title: Re: why Crystal Reports doesn't support Print Dialog to b...
entry.content:
You cannot print a report directly to a PDF file in a WEB app due to permissions etc. It must be Exported to PDF format first and then print the PDF.

Check with the developer to see if he can add an Export button to the application with a format type (PDF) and Export destination.

The problem is if you are accessing the app from an external site you may not have permissions to get the exported file. The Developers would need to be able to stream the PDF file to you.

CR's viewer can't get past what the WEB site allows.

entry.title: Re: Migration of Control Cycle and Assign bin to PSA in C...
entry.content:
Hello Frederik,

For mass migration of Control Cycle please check the app : Mass Create Control Cycles for WM.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2bba750d1e124e1ea2a039bb1cd9b6c5/10a4f7bfd2e643f0a71b1ef3034f673b.html?version=2502.500

For Assignment of Bin to PSA, there is no data migration object. But I am trying to understand your requirement for mass migration of this object. In general you can do the storage bin assignment based on Disposal Party & Supply Area itself, which will be manageable via UI. Product is not required unless your parameters like Staging Method, Calculation type will vary per product. Production Supply Area determination can be based on Workcenter, Bill Of Material Explosion or from product master.  Please check the Material Staging section in SAP Help Document. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2bba750d1e124e1ea2a039bb1cd9b6c5/8800b753128eb44ce10000000a174cb4.html?version=2502.500&q=production+supply+area+determination

Hope this helps.

Best regards

entry.title: How do I deploy a SAP CAPM model to HANA cloud
entry.content:
Hi All

I am trying to deploy multiple CAPM models in BTP Trial account but I am unsuccessful . Finally I went to 

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/deployment/to-cf

and followed the steps verbatim on BAS , but it still failed . 

 

Any suggestions ? 

 

regards

Rishi

entry.title: SLED being populated automatically (LQUA VFDAT )
entry.content:
We have some materials for which we maintain the minimum remaining shelf life in the material master. At the time of GR, system prompts the user to enter the  SLED date. This is carried forward to the WM transfer order and stored in LQUA-VFDAT field.

However, in SOME CASES, system is automatically populating the SLED in WM (LQUA VFDAT). The date seems to be the last GR date for the quant, even though the GR document field is in fact populated with a WM transfer order number. (since it is a bin to bin move and does not have a GR number to go back to.)

It is not in all movements. I am unable to figure out why and how this date is being populated.

I highly appreciate any insights you can provide. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Datahub version compatability with 2211.36
entry.content: Hi @Sabrina, We currently are running on 2211.17. Is this new version on commerce backwards compatible with these older versions?

Afshin

entry.title: Side by Side extension APPlication
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are facing a peculiar issue for our custom side by side application which we have created BTP with S4HANA public cloud. 

Our architecture includes "S4HANA extensibility service" for creating communication arrangements on the Public cloud side along with the development of custom app using NODE.js within CF framework. 

Our destination service connectivity is all intact and we have been able to pull the metadata of the service using the user id and password we provided in the json file we used for the "S4HANA extensibility service"

We have one subaccount and have tied it up with the IAS/IPS server of the S4HANA public cloud. Our global account is still tied up with the standard (default) SAP ID.

 

When we try to get to our portal/workzone subscription site, we get authenticated via IAS server of public cloud which is correct. However, when the site tries to open, we get the below error 

Appreciate your help.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial Account Creation and Enabling Integration Suite service(SAP CPI)
entry.content: Thank u for this

entry.title: Re: Side by Side extension APPlication
entry.content: ????where is the error?

entry.title: Re: How to update the Documentation settings to resolve s...
entry.content:
Hi Stephen,

This is not straightforward but there are a few things that you should consider:

1. There are about 8 or 9 different documentation templates available to generate Enable Now documentation.  The structure of the generated documentation is controlled by the template and cannot be easily changed.  In your case, the template that you have chosen to use places an image after the instruction and this order is not easily modified so one option would be to try a different template

2. The portion of the screen image that is inserted into the documentation is controlled by the cropping marks on each image.  By default, the cropping marks on some images mean that most, if not all, of the screen image is added to the documentation.  This can definitely cause issues, like the ones that you describe.  My advice is that if you are generating documentation using Enable Now you really must consider the cropping marks on the screen images.  These can be modified manually but it is better to use the auto cropping functionality to adjust the size of the cropping marks on each image.  The auto cropping functionality uses settings located in the Resources > Adaptable Resources > Authoring Settings > Auto Crop section of the Resources.  My advice is to set the auto cropping settings to something like the image shown below and then run the auto crop function inside each Simulation by opening a Simulation and selecting Tools > Bulk Changes > Auto Crop All Screens

 

 

 


3. Finally, if you are still having issues, there is one other thing that you can do to force a page break at the relevant section of each Simulation when generating it as documentation.  To do this, open the Simulation and select that action macro of the Step where you want to force a page break during documentation generation.  Select Insert > Insert Documentation Macro > Page Break.  This will force a page break at the corresponding section of the documentation

Regards
Shane

entry.title: CRM Interactive Script Editor - How to view repository objects in sorted order in editor
entry.content: When I go to transaction WUI -> IC_MANAGER -> Process Modeling -> Interactive Script Editor -> under Repository -> Scripts -> I want to see the list in sorted order by default. How to achieve this.

entry.title: Re: In MRP Live can you run MRP as quick as MD03 in Class...
entry.content: Fantastic, thank you Dominik! I've set many 'quick links' like this up for users in many companies but wasn't sure if MRP Live could be linked the same way. In saying that, is there any reason why companies can't simply use MD03 (Classic MRP) linked into MD04 even though they are running MRP Live? From the research that I've done, the answer is 'no problem, you can use MRP Live and Classic transaction together.

entry.title: Re: When reversing MM Document, Check the original docume...
entry.content: In the custome logic "BADI_MMIM_CHECK_MATDOC_ITEM", when reversing a document, I checked that the importing structure "Item_matdoc" contains information on the orginal material document number, and implemented the validity check logic using this the orginal material document number.

entry.title: Re: NEW! Introduction to Artificial Intelligence and SAP Business AI
entry.content: Very excited about this academic lesson! If you have been looking for a way to introduce your students to not only how AI works, but also how it is applied and integrated in our day-to-day and business lives, this is the course for you.

entry.title: Re: WFA Starter Packages Not Loading with No import logs generating
entry.content:
Hi @sfsapsvsv - can you please describe step by step with screen shot for each step on how did you import the template configuration to the instance? I cannot see anything from the load status log so it is as if no import activity has been done before. We never had issue with importing the template configuration so I wonder if there is a misstep when you import the config.  Please also specify which template configuration did you use.  You said advanced starter package but they are two different templates.

Thank you.

entry.title: How to Create a Billable Maintenance Orders in Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi, I have a requirement from a new client that is planning to move from ecc to S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition. Their current process involved a creation of maintenance order first and then the sales order so that they could bill the customer. I am struggling to find a similar process in cloud edition and would like experts help on this.

Please let me know if theres a solution processes currently available that is relevant for this process. If not please let me know how to do this process in cloud edition.

Thank you.

entry.title: Previous year's measure cannot be displayed in table with account dimensions
entry.content:
Hi Team，

Define table including account dimension.

When attempting to create a limit measure for the previous year's results, the account dimension's calculated measure only allows the selection of “Shift Previous Value” and fails to display the previous year's results on the column axis.
How can we display the prior year actuals in the columns?

※Please find the layout attached for your review.

・I want to display the previous year's results as columns as shown on the left.

・The image on the right was tried with a restricted measure, Can't do it because “Shift previous value” is not shown.

Thanks,

Taniguchi

entry.title: Re: Posting attachment to Item Level via API
entry.content:
Hi customer,

 

Using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV

• For attachment at Header Level:

Inthis case BusinessObjectTypeName is BUS2105

• For attachment at item level:

In this case BusinessObjectTypeName is EBAN , the purchase requisition number has to be concatenated with the item number, for example 123456780900010 (item number is 10 including 3 leading zeros).

Kindly refer this KBA 3278412 - Attachments API for Purchase Requisition Items

entry.title: Re: Delivery Completion Indicator PO item - MM_PUR_S4_PO_...

entry.title: Re: OAG1 Transaction settings effects
entry.content: Thanks, good document.  can someone advise on below part also?

entry.title: Direct API call from SAP S/4 HANA public cloud to third party cloud system without Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are working on requirement to integrate SAP and non-SAP system. We have SAP S/4 HANA public cloud edition through which we need to do API call (GET/POST), provided by third party cloud system. I understand we can achieve same with SAP 'Integration suite service' (hosted on SAP BTP account) but in our case it is not an option to do so.

We are looking to do Direct API call ( like how can we do on ECC or S/4 on premise system, by using SM59 HTTP connection and using cl_http* class) .

But can we achieve same with SAP S/4 HANA public cloud edition without any integration (middleware) system?

It would be very helpful if someone has any insights regarding this.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Import Collection Dependency Issue
entry.content: Hi, Did you manage to resolve this. As I am having the same type of issue. regards.

entry.title: The feasibility of two functionalities in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

Here are two simple questions we want to figure out:

1. Is it possible to sort by 2 measures on a single table?

2. How to filter the rows where the corresponding measure value > 25%?

We are using SAC with Datasphere as our backend datasource. The developer from SAC table team has confirmed that the two functionalities are not available currently. So we wonder if they're available in Datasphere. Thanks for your help.

Regards,

Jason

entry.title: Re: Financial budget, specifically GL-based budgeting.
entry.content:
Hello @Seenivasaragavan ,

The Import Financial Plan Data functionality can be used to upload planning/budget. Please refer to the help portal link for your reference: Managing Financial Plan Data | SAP Help Portal

You can also check the related scope item 1HB - Financial Plan Data Upload from File: Process Navigator - SAP for Me

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content: Hi @Abed - I think that structure you see under the Unmapped category for Supervisor dimension is coming from initial build when you initially created a generated dimension. When you change to manually generated, it keeps whatever already show up under Unmapped category as is. What you can do is delete everything from Unmapped category in Dimension Editor and re-run the initial load, see what values coming out under the Unmapped category after that.

entry.title: Re: Access Control - Assessment of users, roles and their...
entry.content: Hi Ra32,

entry.title: Re: Document Grounding in SAP AI Core: RAG with AWS S3 via Object Store Service on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Thanks @piotr_goralewski 
As far as I know, selective folder-based grounding isn’t currently supported for S3 (hopefully this will be supported in the future); it’s currently only available for Microsoft SharePoint.
But you can try these workarounds:
- The Pipeline API only processes PDF and DOCX files; other formats or document without those extensions are ignored.
- Alternatively, you can filter documents using metadata (e.g., via '/retrieval/search'), see example here. Or Orchestration API, you can checkout 'DocumentGroundingFilter' schema here.

entry.title: How to maintain provide Discount functionality in Service order and service confirmation?
entry.content:
Dear Sap support team,

Can you please provide Discount functionality in Service order and service confirmation same like Sales order?


Thanks & Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to maintain provide Discount functionality in Ser...
entry.content:
Dear requester,

Currently the Product Discount(%) is not available in the Services and Spare Parts tab and therefore you can only add the Product Discount(%) in the Pricing and Invoicing tab and the Pricing sub tab of the Service Order and Service Confirmation documents.

Before that, Product Discount(%) needs activated for Item Display in your Business Configuration.

  1. Go to the Business Configuration work center.
  2. Select the Implementation Projects view.
  3. Select your implementation project and click on Open Activity List.
  4. Navigate to the Fine-Tune step.
  5. Open the Activity Configure Price Strategy.
  6. Click on the Pricing Procedure hyperlink.
  7. Select the Standard Pricing Procedure.
  8. Select Step 011 Product Discount (%).
  9. You need to ensure that the Item Display is set to Yes.

The same is described in the KBA: 2886049 - How to Add a Product Discount(%) in a Service Order for an Item.

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: EWA Reporting to enable
entry.content:
Dear PERSON_NAME,
 
We want Early watch Alerts to enable for our DEV and PRD Servers

PERSON_NAME report should generate
Routed to ashwani_kumar@indsphinx.com

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EWA Reporting to enable
entry.content:
To generate EWA report for your system, there are 3 methods. 
1.An ABAP system is capable to send the service data to SAP directly without involvement of a Solution Manager. The EarlyWatch Alert is then processed in an SAP internal system. The results are made available in the SAP EarlyWatch Alert Workspace app in your SAP One Support Launchpad. Additionally, the resulting Word Report is made available to you in the SAP One Support Launchpad in the Service Messages app.
Please refer the following KBA for details.
##207223 - SAP EarlyWatch Alert Processed at SAP
2.The same applies, if your ABAP system is connected to a Focused Run for Solution Manager (FRUN) system. In this scenario, the FRUN sends the EWA service data to SAP.
2930644 - Focused Run: EarlyWatch Alert Troubleshooting Guide - Guided Answer 

3. if you are using SOLMAN, please refer to following KBA:
2131244 - How to create an Ad Hoc EarlyWatch Alert in SAP Solution Manager 7.1 [Video]
2282944 - EarlyWatch Alert: Solution Manager 7.2 how to setup/configure EWA reports or add email recipients

entry.title: Activate activity-based consolidation of Investments
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

we would like to use the activity-Based Consolidation of Investments. As this is not activated by default in the cloud solution anymore, we request to activate the activity-Based Consolidation of Investments in our cloud system, as we do not wish to use rule-based consolidation. Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Activate activity-based consolidation of Investments
entry.content:
If you are new customer from 2402 version, You cannot use Activity based  COI in Cloud system.

We have explain this in below help  Consolidation of Investments (Activity-Based)

As of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402, new customers cannot use the Consolidation of Investments (Activity-Based) function. Customers who have been using this function prior to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402 release can continue to do so.

If not, you can use Task Group S21 for your consolidation monitor , which contains automatic posting task 2101 for activity-based C/I.

Hope this could help you solve the concern.

Best Regards

entry.title: Mass data upload/enhance tool in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Use case: we are seeing the requirement to have the mass upload tool for SAP DM where we can upload/enhance the master data using this tool as we have data in excel/csv format.

For e.g.: customer is having so many data collection parameter and NC logging reason codes in the system so manually it will take lot of efforts and chances of error in configuration is very high. 

in ME/MII  we had the ability to develop the custom action block and deploy in MII and then we can call the API's of SAP ME to configure the data. Similar like functionality looking in SAP DM.

Has anyone also faced the similar challenge in their case and how you have overcome to this challenge. Just wanted to check the opinion of the community. 

One approach i am seeing to develop a application/extension using Business application studio other then that if any other approaches are there please feel free to share the thoughts.

Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: Re: Create a PDF with password without command execute
entry.content: Hi Arun, but there is a comment in that blog saying "You can disable the client side Javascript execution in Adobe Reader. Then nothing of this code is executed. Some companies even have this disabled per default (security reasons)" if we use javascript on the adobeform..

entry.title: Re: Automatic Payment Reconciliation Using Japan Invoice...
entry.content: 1. The most important part for Japan Invoice Summary automatic clearing is single-match. As a result, alternative name has to be 100% match. In case multiple qualified alternative names are found, the clearing will be skipped. 2. Japan Invoice Summary automatic clearing is sufficient to complete the interpretation stage.

entry.title: Connected License To Server is not Authenticated
entry.content: Hi guys, I'm having a problem connecting client to Server, I'm using SAP B1 2502 and getting the error "Connected License To Server is not Authenticated". I've opened all the necessary ports 40000, 40020, 50000, 8100, 60000

entry.title: SAP Workzone Local Entry Point plan availability
entry.content:
Hi 

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition - Local Entry Point Business Solutions is in General Availabilty as of April 17 2025

I am following the SAP documentation for creating a local entry point in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition. The guide states that I need to create an instance of the build-workzone-standard service with the local-entry-point plan in the SAP BTP cockpit.

However, when I try to create a service instance, I do not see the local-entry-point plan listed under the available plans or entitlements for build-workzone-standard. Australia Sydney AWS.

  • Where can I find the local-entry-point plan?

  • Are there any prerequisites or steps I might have missed to make this plan available?

Cheers

JSP

entry.title: Re: LMS Curriculum Item Status Report
entry.content:
Hi Prithveer, 

I recently encountered an issue with the Curriculum Item Status Report, specifically affecting e-learning items. After a deep-dive analysis, I discovered that the problem stems from the Online Content Settings. To resolve this, the "Add to history on completion of all content" setting must be enabled.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: 费用分摊一次生成多张凭证Generate multiple identical vouchers for cost allocation at once
entry.content:
Hi Dear Experts,

现在运行4月月结的费用分摊，但是每个费用科目一次性生成了3张凭证（只运行了一次），其中两笔是对冲的状态，因此我有两个问题：
①为什么会生成3张呢，正常情况下是一次一张，和上个月没有运行会有关系吗？

②现在看下来，虚增了发生额，每个科目的金额都翻了3倍，但余额为0，在计算成本的时候，可以正确的算出成本吗？

SAP S/4HANA Finance 

以上，求解答，非常感谢！

entry.title: Re: Column editable on Fiori Element List report
entry.content:
Hello @raina_goyal 

It should trigger the onInit method. Can you check the link below? 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-can-i-get-the-model-data-of-the-object-page-in-my-extension-in-a-fiori/qaq-p/11957049 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/oninit-hook-is-not-executing-from-controller/qaq-p/14047959

entry.title: Re: App could't be opened either due to an incorrect conf...
entry.content:
Hi All,

If you face this type of error during Upload Customer Returns, you should check the below catalog that should be assigned to the sales representative role. If you assigned it properly in the role, then your issue will be resolved. 

SAP_SD_BC_CUSTRET_IMPORT_PC

Thanks 
Hasnat

entry.title: Re: Export multiple datasphere objects at the same time a...
entry.content:
You can use below approaches depending on the views,

Export the highest level view and it will capture all the dependencies by itself.

Second, you can create dummy Entity Relationship object by just adding all those views into teh ER, then you can export that ER. You don't have to do anything in that ER such as creating relationships etc 

Please let me know if that works

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Customer-specific data were not saved due to error CV...
entry.content:
Hi All,

The possible case would be the BP number range is maintained externally, and if you are trying to upload a customer with your customized template, then you need to see the program for custom upload. In our case, if we create a customer through BP, then we do not find any issue; however, if we are trying it with the customer upload program, then the roles FLCU00 and FLCU01 internal BP codes were not updated. 

Thank You
Hasnat

entry.title: Re: Return Sales Order CBRE Approver Does not get any not...
entry.content:
Hi All,

In this case, step by step, all the necessary configurations you need to check. We have found that some configuration was missing in the production system. It might be that your TR was moved with some objects that are related to workflow configuration. So, check that all the necessary configurations are moved properly or not. 

Thank you
Hasnat

entry.title: Re: Change history for rfc destinations (SM59)
entry.content:
This is an old thread but if anyone needs to know

Go to t-code : SCU3
Select "Analyze Logs"
Table : RFCDES
Provide appropriate Date range
Select radio button : Tables
Execute

entry.title: Re: Demand Driven MRP (DDMRP)：Create consumption data que...
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. DDRMRP works properly when there is transactional data. However, since the customer has just started using SAP and there is no transactional data yet, we are wondering if there is a way to input historical data so that DDRMRP can operate based on it. I tried maintaining historical data in the Forecasting view of the material master, but it does not seem to have any effect. Does this mean that the customer must use SAP for a period of time before DDRMRP can be implemented? Best regards Lance

entry.title: Re: UI Data Protection: New approach to achieve system wide data protection using Data-Element
entry.content:
Hi Maxb1978,

UI Masking is available as a separate licenced Add-on for ECC and S/4HANA. You need to procure it and install in your system to get the above mentioned functionality.

Reach out to your SAP Account Executive and he/she will be able to help.

Regards,
Arun

entry.title: Re: Previous year's measure cannot be displayed in table...
entry.content: In the section screenshot, you should choose option  Navigation -> To Date -> Year,  can't judge what you selected on your side.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Application Studio can't check in all files
entry.content:
hello

till now, you should use Isolated Shell 2015 not vs2022.

kindly refer below:

entry.title: Re: Find Import user for transports
entry.content: I also has similar requirement, your solution solved my issue. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Task Center not attributing tasks correctly
entry.content: @carlos_santos_ you need to add approver's email id comma separated by global user id in the recipient section of your SBPA workflow process

entry.title: Re: Convert SAP Old code to SAP New Syntax
entry.content:
Thank your for your quick reply. All three tables contain more than 1,000 records, and the internal tables are sorted by key. The above code is executed under the OPEN DATASET command to write a file to the application server, which is why we are transferring the table data to p_file, which is of type string.

We are experiencing performance issues, so we are trying to improve performance by using modern inline syntax.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite for DEV and PROD
entry.content:
Thanks for the answer! 
I will check again how many instance we can create via entitlement.
So if I understand this correct, the best way will be to use two subaccounts. One for DEV and one for PROD.
Or there any other posibilities.

entry.title: Re: Previous year's measure cannot be displayed in table...
entry.content:
Thank you for your response. I selected it as advised but it does not show up.

Navigation -> Full Time Interval -> Year ,The overall amount for the previous year is displayed for each month.
What I would like to achieve is to show the previous year's actual amount for each DATE. If it is a year, I would like to display only the previous year's total amount. If it is April, I would like to display only the previous year's April results.

entry.title: failed to open the connection, Detail: IM002 [Microsoft] [ODBC Driver Manager]
Re: How to throw errors from REST API calls (CAP CDS and...
entry.content:
Have you tried

req.error(40x, "error msg");

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/events#req-error

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit: Error AM 215 - Country changing in...
entry.content:
Hello @Paul_H 

Thanks for posting your question on Community and for the very detailed information.

AM215 error returns from Address Management area. While from migration cockpit perspective, could you please have a look on the following points first?

  1. In the mapping task, are you using internal numbering or external numbering? Is the target bp number set to the one you want extend?
  2. If you are using S/4HANA product, is the configuration correctly set for this country? (Table: T005S) Or if you are in Public Edition, you can check configuration activity 103826.

Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards,
Irene

entry.title: Re: MODIFICATION OF THE VALUATION CLASS IN PRODUCT MASTER DATA
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no further updates under the topic. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions. Best regards, Irene

entry.title: Re: Requirement to trigger automated email on production...
entry.content:
Hello Ankit,

by using SAP Standard functionality you can check if the "Output parameter determination" can solve your requirement. Typically it is used e.g. to print the necessary production paperwork but you can also send out an email. Depending on the information you want to send out. You can create a custom form and add the necessary information.

Here you find additional information on howto setup with custom forms: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/how-to-generate-multiple-output-items-for-production-orders-with-different/ba-p/13733888

Here some additional information regarding "Sending emails" in public cloud.

I hope this helps.

Regards Johannes
Johannes Schulte | Senior SAP Expert
Email: johannes.schulte@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com
On behalf of: Vicoland GmbH
Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: SAP BDC Free Trial Version
entry.content: Would like to know around when SAP BDC Trial Version will be available ?

entry.title: Re: Add custom field to condition table
entry.content:
Hi,

you first have to add it to the KOMPAZ structure.

 

Kind regards

Robert

entry.title: Re: why Crystal Reports doesn't support Print Dialog to b...
entry.content:
Hi Don, thanks for your reply, If I can't show Print Preview dialog directly in crystal report viewer. so is there a way to customize print button click-event? I think I can export PDF in guid format then open url in external tab and show Print Preview Dialog. or if you have an idea to show browser Print Preview dialog when click on Print. what I actually need is just show a Print Preview dialog for current viewed report. https://prnt.sc/rjXpKnvJitDq I don't mean direct printing. but I want show the browser preview dialog.

Edit:

I found little trick solution. but it doesn't show print preview for all report pages.

See my video

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4rAZ5Jb01hU

A trick is from
https://stackoverflow.com/questions/29486992/print-crystal-report-directly-in-asp-net-c-sharp

Please why Crystal Reports doesn't support Print Preview dialog?

entry.title: Re: Missing configuration items in Manage your solution
entry.content:
Hi @Marin_p 

I searched in our SSCUI list for the mentioned two configuration activities.

Finance > Statutory Reporting > Electronic Communication
Define Parameters for Electronic Communication with Authorities 102367
Specialized for Certain Countries
AT, BE, CH, CZ, DE, DK, FI, GB, IT, LU, NL, PL, SE, SK,
=> This is a country dependent SSCUI, could you please check if the same Country selected in Q and P system?

Finance > Statutory Reporting > Tax
Make Settings for Electronic Communication with Authorities 103726
Global
=> SSCUI 103726 is belonging to the path: Finance > Statutory Reporting > Tax, could you please check from this path?

Best regards,
Irene

entry.title: Re: Automatic Stock Transfer Requisition Based on ATP Che...
entry.content:
Hello,

I think it will not fully solve your mentioned requirements but describe the possibilities in S/4HANA Public Cloud:

  • Regarding ATP check: The check is executed in the plant where the demand appears, in your case 1010. In the first step the system cannot confirm the demand if in 1010 is no stock or no purchasing objects.
  • MRP will run and create a purchase requisition, based on your settings. If you use the special procurement key the purchase req. will be created for a specific plant. You need to setup ATP check for intercompany stock transfer order. In addition you can setup the automatic purchase order creation process.
  • If you do not want to link a specific supplying plant via special procurement key, you need to adjust the purchase req. manually. I do not see any possibility to control the purchase req. creation based on the ATP situation in a specific plant.

Regards

Regards Johannes
Johannes Schulte | Senior SAP Expert
Email: johannes.schulte@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com
On behalf of: Vicoland GmbH
Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: 3rd Party SO created and then deleted one item with rejection code .But PR still showing
entry.content:
Dear SAP Gurus,

Please help me to resolve one problem. I have created 3rd Parts SO with 7 Line items.

After  i noticed one Line item is wrongly added , i deleted this one Line item in SO by giving Rejection reason and saved SO.

PR which is generated in Background automatically , still shows the  rejected Line item from SO. I have to then delete it manually  in PR.

So how can i achieve that if  one line item  in SO is rejected, it  should not show me  in PR .

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: JDBC Adapter Fails to Parse Scalar Response from Stor...
entry.content:
Thanks @Ryan-Crosby,

So, it seems there's no way to prevent the failure entirely as long as the stored procedure returns a scalar value without a column alias. However, I still need a workable solution.

Is there any way to inspect the actual payload being returned by the JDBC adapter? I suspect the response might be something like <>1234</> or just the raw value 1234, which could be causing the parsing failure. While I’m fairly certain we’re receiving a numeric value from the database, the JDBC adapter might be expecting a well-formed XML structure—leading to this error.

Ideally, I’d like to capture and inspect this raw response somehow, even if it’s through an exception subprocess. So far, I've used ${exception.message}, which only gives the error text. Is there any other expression or method that would expose the actual response payload that triggered the failure?

Coming from an IIB middleware background, I’m used to having more visibility into message contents during errors. Navigating SAP CI is still new to me, and this limited visibility is proving to be a challenge.

entry.title: Re: Multi-Action Starter in a Story (ODE) - Populate para...
entry.content: You use a multi action script object in story, then you could fill the parameter dynamically via script coding.

entry.title: Re: Mass data upload/enhance tool in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi, I agree the right approach is a side-by-side extension e.g on top of SAP BTP using the public APIs available. Other than that I do not see an option.

Regards, Katja

entry.title: ABAP Extensibility tutorial : Create a Shopping Cart Business Object
entry.content:
Been following Tutorial Create a Shopping Cart Business Object

This should create a simple UI for the cart in our 3-tier SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.  This is done via Eclipse IDE and is connected to our SAP S/4 Development client.  This has nothing at all to do with BTP ABAP (we don't even have that installed)

I can create the Table in the Eclipse IDE.  I know the Table now exists in SAP S/4 (as I wrote a simple OO ABAP class running in console to check ! ).

But the on Right-click the created database table to Generate ABAP Repository Objects is not going to Generate any object .  Why so !?.

Generate ABAP Repository Objects.Does not Generate anythingat least I know my DB Table exists

entry.title: Request to Link Universal ID to New S-user ID
entry.content:
Hello,

Kindly link my Universal ID to the newly created S-user ID
This will allow seamless access and continuity across SAP platforms.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request to Link Universal ID to New S-user ID
entry.content:
Please kindly note that his process can only be done from customer side, our support team does not have such authorization.

If you already have UID account ,please refer to 2882908 - How to add an additional account to a Universal ID to add S-user S-user to the UIID account.

If you do not have any UID account, please refer to 2882963 - How to create the SAP Universal ID (UID) to create a new UID account for S-user.

entry.title: Re: Previous year's measure cannot be displayed in table...
entry.content: Sorry, I mis-typed in last reply, it should be Navigation -> previous -> Year

entry.title: SAP Solution Manager DVM Applications are not showings required information
entry.content:
SAP Solution Manager DVM Applications are not showings required information, like Data Reduction Potentials not available for ECC/S4 and also Regression/ Compression savings not available for S4 system even though we activated the DVM and enabled the DVM under EWA. please check the attached screenshot for your reference and we don't see any errors at solmon_setup for initial/basic configurations, EWA, DVM .

 

we activated DVM for <SID> - ECC, <SID> - S4 HANA Systems and also there is no errors in RTCCTOOL in all managed and solution manager systems.

 

we are looking to understand the data reduction potential analysis and number of old records under the tables which are not archiving as expected. 

 

please find the attached document screenshot for details


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Solution Manager DVM Applications are not showing...
entry.content:
Hi ,

 

Please allow me to first explain about "No Applicable Data Found" in "Data Reduction Potential", this is because a Potential Savings Analysis has not been scheduled.

 

To schedule a Potential Savings Analysis and populate the Potential Savings Dashboard with data please see Chapter 3.6.4.1 Potential Savings of the Data Volume Management User Guide.

Data_Volume_Management_User_Guide_2020.pdf

 

Regarding the no data available in "Reorganization and Compression Potential", could you please create a new ticket?

 

Best regards,

Leo

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Delivery block field greyed out using VA02
entry.content:
VA02 have Delivery Block field, which can be grey out for some users even if the user have full rights of VA02 or SAP_ALL.

Check enhancement in tcode(VA02) which should be having variable/variable sets, check those variable name in table TVARVC. The values in table can be changed directly from SE16n (not recommended) or from tcode(STVARV) -> Selection Options tab ( should be having variables name at end in the list ) and having the SAP User ID's for which this block should be enabled or disabled depending on the abap code.

Reward points if it helps.

entry.title: 3rd Party SO created and deleted one line item with rejection code, in PR still showing deleted line
entry.content:
Dear SAP Gurus,

Please help me to resolve one problem. I have created 3rd Parts SO with 7 Line items.

After  i noticed one Line item is wrongly added , i deleted this one Line item in SO by giving Rejection reason and saved SO.

PR which is generated in Background automatically , still shows the  rejected Line item from SO. I have to then delete it manually  in PR.

So how can i achieve that if  one line item  in SO is rejected, it  should not show me  in PR .

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Previous year's measure cannot be displayed in table...
entry.content:
Hi @TF2,

In two way you can achieve this

1. In story create restrict calculation 

Select date as previous interval 

2. Create model level calculation 

Lookup(Measure,Date=previous(month,12)

2. In story restrict on above measure

 

You will get the last year actuals..

Kindly accept the solution it you find it useful. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Direct API call from SAP S/4 HANA public cloud to thi...
entry.content:
Hi yashoratna,

for implementation of outbound calls to external APIs using ABAP Cloud, please refer to Integration and Connectivity as well as the linked development guide which provides corresponding examples.

Instead of maintaining SM59 destinations, you maintain the connections using the Communication Management apps.

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Previous year's measure cannot be displayed in table...
entry.content: Thank you very much. The navigation you provided is not displayed. This is a report for a model with an account dimension, so this navigation is on the account side (rows) of the account dimension, but not on the column side. Is there any alternative? Please let us know.

entry.title: Re: Direct API call from SAP S/4 HANA public cloud to thi...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, direct outbound API calls to external (non-SAP) systems without using SAP Integration Suite or other middleware are extremely limited and generally not supported in the same way as in ECC or S/4HANA On-Premise.

Here’s a breakdown of why and what your options are:

 

Why direct outbound HTTP calls aren't possible like in ECC/on-prem:

1. No access to classic ABAP tools:
In Public Cloud, you don’t have access to transaction codes like SM59, or to use cl_http_client or if_http_client classes. You also cannot create RFC destinations freely.

2. Restricted development environment:
The ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP) used in Public Cloud restricts many classic capabilities, especially anything involving direct network access.

3. Security and tenant isolation:
Outbound internet calls (to arbitrary APIs) are restricted for security and stability reasons. All communication is supposed to go through approved communication scenarios and communication arrangements.

 

What are your options in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Here are the only viable ways to communicate with external APIs:

1. Call External APIs Using Outbound Communication Arrangements (HTTP):

  • SAP allows outbound communication through Communication Arrangements based on Communication Scenarios.
  • You can define an Outbound Service using Custom Communication Scenario and then consume an external REST API via HTTP POST/GET using OpenAPI (Swagger) definition or manual configuration.
  • You'll implement the call using a Custom Logic (BAdI) or Custom Business Object that supports outbound calls.

You must use the "Call HTTP Service" API functionality provided in custom code (limited to certain extensibility options like ABAP Cloud).

 

2. Use Outbound Services with External APIs

  • In Custom Business Logic, you can define an outbound service call using HTTP with OAuth2 or Basic Auth, configured in a Communication Arrangement.
  • You can build a Custom Communication Scenario (in key user extensibility) and trigger HTTP calls from that.

 

3. Workaround via Side-by-Side Extensibility

If your use case is too complex or unsupported by direct outbound options:

  • Build an extension in SAP BTP (Kyma, CAP, or ABAP environment).
  • Your S/4HANA Cloud system pushes events or data to your side-by-side app (via Outbound API or Event Mesh), and that app calls the external API.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Asset Accounting - Legacy data transfer at end of the year - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Automatic Transfer via SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit To create a new legacy data transfer segment, follow these steps in the "Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting-Specific" app:

1. Open the "Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting-Specific" app. 2. Select the company code for which you intend to migrate legacy data.

3. Choose the "Edit" button.

4. In the "Legacy Data Transfer Settings" tab, select the "Create" button.

5. Specify the required parameters or confirm the default values:
○ Enter a transfer date: 31.12.XXXX
○ Transfer status: Ongoing (Other Postings Allowed)
○ Document type: Asset Posting (AA) (Choose according to your business needs)
○ If necessary, set the indicator to suppress depreciation calculation. ○ Enter a comment, if necessary.

6. Click "Save."

 

Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit App

Upon opening the "Fixed Asset - Postings Template," you must fill in the posting key. Then, complete the cumulative values table based on your business requirements.

Key considerations often resulting in errors include:
1. Current Fiscal Year: This should reflect the highest fiscal year set for the current company code.
2. Subledger-specific line item type: Expand the eighth row to view and verify the specific line item type for the subledger.

Customers typically want to transfer data such as asset values and accumulated depreciation.
• Fiscal Year: 2025
• Legacy Data Transfer Date: 03.15.2024

Here is an example for reference:
• Asset Number: 12345678
• Asset Acquisition Value: 1000 EUR
• Cumulative Depreciation Value: -200 EUR

The content for filling out the template is as follows:


There are many other subledger-specific line item types available. You can select and fill these out according to your actual business requirements.

 

Help Portal Link:

Transfer at End of Fiscal Year

Fixed asset - Postings

entry.title: Re: Previous year's measure cannot be displayed in table...
entry.content: I'm also having a model with account dimension, I don't think it's a problem... Not sure why the navigation option is displayed.

entry.title: Sapphire In Orlando 2025: Responsible AI
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I lead SAP's Responsible AI team, spearheading the integration of robust security and AI ethics frameworks into SAP Business AI. I and my team work towards ensuring SAP Business AI powered enterprise solutions are not only innovative, but also trustworthy, ethical, resilient, and compliant. I'm pleased to invite you to my sessions at SAP Sapphire Orlando and together delve deeper into these topics.

Responsible AI - Sapphire 2025 Sessions:

AI security: Ask the experts your toughest questions - BAI2613- Tuesday, May 20 11:00 AM - 11:20 AM EDT

Responsible AI in action: Building trust and driving innovation - BAI2612- Tuesday, May 20 3:30 PM - 3:50 PM EDT

Securing AI: How SAP protects business data and workflows - BAI2611- Wednesday, May 21 2:30 PM - 2:50 PM EDT

Responsible AI - Sapphire Virtual Session:

Responsible AI at SAP: Ethics, security, and compliance in focus - BAI5089v - Tuesday, May 20 11:00 AM - 11:20 AM EDT

What you will learn about:

Using Generative AI to improve how your business works isn't just a nice idea anymore, it's essential to stay competitive. Robust, ethical, and secure AI solutions drive customer trust and safeguard business operations. At SAP, Responsible AI is woven into the fabric of our Business AI strategy, ensuring that every stage from design and development to operations is underpinned by strict security standards and regulatory controls.

Our SAP Business AI portfolio, including AI Core, Joule, Foundation models and embedded AI solutions, is built on a foundation of “Trust by Design.” These products embody security and privacy controls right from base design, integrating robust cloud security principles, enterprise-grade operational policies, and an agile governance model to meet global regulatory standards. Business AI cloud services leverage security controls and operational logic built into SAP Business Suite and provide transparency, business relevance, content moderation, resilience against attacks and regulatory compliance.

Regulatory frameworks and ethical guidelines—rooted in global principles such as UNESCO’s recommendations—guide our AI ethics framework. This ensures fairness, human oversight, and relentless accountability in high-stakes scenarios. For instance, Joule’s capabilities in enforcing user access combined with relevance of AI outcome and agentic workflows not only support operational excellence but also proactively mitigate risks by continuously aligning with evolving security and ethical benchmarks.

As the discussion on security and privacy in Artificial Intelligence intensifies, SAP’s commitment is clear: an integrated approach that anticipates risks, enforces robust controls, and reinforces ethical AI use. We are excited to delve deeper into these topics at SAP Sapphire Orlando 2025.

Related community managed tags you should subscribe to remain informed about this topic:

SAP Business AI

SAP AI Core

Joule

Related community topic pages:

SAP Business AI

SAP AI Core

Joule

Looking forward to seeing you:

Connect with our experts, explore detailed use cases, and discover how our SAP Business AI stack is designed to foster secure, compliant, and responsible AI – bringing out the best in every business.

Now let’s hear from you:

Please share in the comments section which factor of artificial intelligence you think is primary driver in user's trust in AI?

entry.title: Re: GRC - Parameter 1071 set to "ASYNC" - can this bypass TEST and DEVELOPMENT tagged role
entry.content: how often do you run batch risk analysis currently we run it once a day but I believe because of this some of our requests are not being evaluted for SoDs

entry.title: How do not fill zterm in me21n for a particular order type?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How do not fill zterm in me21n for a particular order type?
I',m enter KONNR and KTPNR field and if order type is REPL i don't want to fill zterm after pressing 'Enter'.
I found zcl_im_me_process_po_cust->PROCESS_HEADER method, which is badi of ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST, but if i wll clear the value here - it will always clear the value i enter by myself before saving.
Also i found EXIT_SAPMM06E_008, but as i understand it only for new field, and i cannot add zterm into CI_EKKODB.
